response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify two distinct song performances: 'Hour Time Yellow' by ReGLOSS and 'Genesis' by Hololive English -Advent-. 2. Used search queries to resolve official composer information and confirm lyrics. 3. Extracted and formatted full lyrics for both songs, ensuring correct newline and quote handling. 4. Created scene objects with appropriate timestamps.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two consecutive vocal performances from a Hololive countdown live concert: 'Hour Time Yellow' performed by ReGLOSS, and 'Genesis' performed by members of Hololive English -Advent-.

scenes.description: The song 'Hour Time Yellow' is performed by ReGLOSS. The stage features bright yellow and blue visuals.
scenes.song_title: アワータイムイエロー
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Verse 1]
ソラヲボエで挑む人生ゲーム
言い訳めいたハートに従って
現実は半即興なプロットです
取り憑かれるオーバーな芝居

[Pre-Chorus]
世渡り上手なあの子はね (Hey)
二度と被った猫外せない
痛みを知ってしまったmagician
手の内は未だ明かせない

[Chorus]
Yellow, yellow
ゼロからループ点滅するピリオド
Yellow, yellow
染まる紅い化粧
I wonder if I can make it or not

[Verse 2]
例えツキに見放されても
No worries私には私がついてる

[Pre-Chorus]
宵が醒めるまであと少しだけ
真のi捕える残像
Slow and steady wins the race
次の季節を越え blooming blooming
どうかこの音を止めないで

[Chorus]
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow
ずっとstay gold
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow

[Chorus]
Let's enjoy the moment

[Verse 3]
Look into the mirror
絡まってる蜘蛛の糸
It happens all the time
踊らされたって構わない

[Pre-Chorus]
夜を日に継いで時を編んで明け暮れて
Always be honest
永遠に変わらないもの

[Chorus]
Yellow, yellow
手をとり合えばそこに理由はいらない
Yellow, yellow
染まる紅い化粧
A smile suits you best

[Bridge]
幾つになってもchangeless
希望夢は人知れず
歪で数奇な運命や
人生ごと受け入れる

[Bridge]
心機一転 二転 三転 詠んで第五感でlock on
右見て左見てpause前だけ向いてgo on

[Bridge]
歌い続ける24/7
終着地点はeden or heaven?

[Bridge]
No time to waste
"今"だけを信じてる
最後のフィナーレまで共に進め

[Pre-Chorus]
宵が醒めるまであと少しだけ
真のi捕える残像
Slow and steady wins the race
次の季節を越え blooming blooming
どうかこの音を止めないで

[Chorus]
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow
ずっとstay gold
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow

[Chorus]
Let's enjoy the moment
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
Attempting a life game with half-remembered memories
Following a heart filled with excuses
The reality is a semi-improvised plot
An over-the-top act I'm possessed by

[Pre-Chorus]
That girl who's so good at getting along (Hey)
She can't ever take off the mask she put on
A magician who has learned of pain
Cannot yet reveal her hand

[Chorus]
Yellow, yellow
A loop from zero, a blinking period
Yellow, yellow
Stained with red makeup
I wonder if I can make it or not

[Verse 2]
Even if I'm abandoned by luck
No worries, I have myself with me

[Pre-Chorus]
Just a little more until the night wakes up
A true image captured, a lingering illusion
Slow and steady wins the race
Crossing into the next season, blooming, blooming
Please don't stop this sound

[Chorus]
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow
Always stay gold
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow

[Chorus]
Let's enjoy the moment

[Verse 3]
Look into the mirror
Spider threads tangled up
It happens all the time
I don't mind being made to dance

[Pre-Chorus]
Connecting night to day, weaving time, through the dawn and dusk
Always be honest
Something that will never change

[Chorus]
Yellow, yellow
If we hold hands, no reason is needed there
Yellow, yellow
Stained with red makeup
A smile suits you best

[Bridge]
Changeless no matter how old I get
Hopes and dreams, unknown to others
Even distorted and strange fates
I accept life as it is

[Bridge]
Turning over a new leaf, flipping, turning, reciting, lock on with the fifth sense
Look right, look left, pause, facing only forward, go on

[Bridge]
Singing 24/7
Is the final destination Eden or heaven?

[Bridge]
No time to waste
I only believe in 'now'
Proceed together until the final finale

[Pre-Chorus]
Just a little more until the night wakes up
A true image captured, a lingering illusion
Slow and steady wins the race
Crossing into the next season, blooming, blooming
Please don't stop this sound

[Chorus]
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow
Always stay gold
Hourtime yellow, yellow
Let it blow, let it blow

[Chorus]
Let's enjoy the moment

scenes.description: The song 'Genesis' is performed by members of Hololive English -Advent-. The stage lighting is intense with red and blue hues.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
Time to open up your eyes
Feel the music start to rise
Got to break the world and let me in
I know I was meant to be
Livin' life so fast and free
Try to keep your eyes on me
'Cause this is where my story all begins

[Verse 1]
Livin' it up like crazy
Ready to play? Come at me
Carried away so easy
I can't get enough
Free as a bird, no limit
Haven't you heard? I'm fearless
Get up and go, let's do this

[Verse 2]
Watch me, watch me, watch me
Watch me, watch me, watch me be your diva
I'm gonna raise your fever
Shakin' up all the crowd
Making some noise when I'm not allowed
Livin' my life out loud
I have awakened to wisdom beyond understanding
I keep indulging in my every whim (Let it out!)

[Pre-Chorus]
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Don't blame me if I shine too bright
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Can't help it if I start a fight
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Now pay attention, please
'Cause this is only the beginning
It's our genesis
Coming to wreak some havoc
How do you like this plot twist?
I'm embracing my madness
(Can you hear it?)

[Chorus]
Whispers banging down your window (Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Rumors reaching a crescendo (Ah-ha-ha)
No humble beginnings, I'm destined for great things
I'm sure you've heard of me by now, woah-oh
Midnight, draw me to the dark side (Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Daylight, take me on a joyride (Ah-ha-ha)
My crime is my passion, I'm mayhem in action
I know what day it is
This is our genesis

[Verse 3]
(Ohh) Gonna start the rave
When I misbehave, take center stage
(Ohh) Let the fun commence
But you know I'm gonna get intense

[Verse 4]
There are loopholes unspoken, the rules can all be broken
I'm running on a rampage, the world is a blank page (Let's go)
I'm writing my story in flames and in glory
They're gonna know me by name

[Pre-Chorus]
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Is this my promised land?
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
The future's in my hands
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
But they don't understand
That I'm a star in the making
Awaking and taking a bow-bow-bow-bow
Tell me, how you like me now?

[Instrumental Break]

[Bridge]
Come and watch me, watch me, watch me, watch me
Let your worries go, gonna show you how to lose control, ready?
You've got to free your mind, leave your restraint behind
Be outrageous, the chaos is contagious
Come on, you know what time it is
It's our genesis

[Pre-Chorus]
Time to open up your eyes
Feel the music start to rise
Got to break the world and let me in
I know I was meant to be
Livin' life so fast and free
Try to keep your eyes on me
'Cause this is our beginning
It's our genesis

[Chorus]
Whispers banging down your window (Ah-ha-ha; Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Rumors reaching a crescendo (Ah-ha-ha)
No humble beginnings, I'm destined for great things
I'm sure you've heard of me by now, woah-oh
Midnight, draw me to the dark side (Ah-ha-ha; Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Daylight, take me on a joyride (Ah-ha-ha)
My crime is my passion, I'm mayhem in action
I know what day it is
This is our genesis

[Outro]
You know what time it is?
It's our genesis
Tell me what time it is
It's our genesis
Yeah, you know what time it is?
It's our genesis
Tell me what time it is
It's our genesis
